---

> **Note:** This repo uses [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/). When merging, the squash commit title must follow the format:
>
> ```
> <type>: <description>
> ```
>
> Common types: `feat`, `fix`, `docs`, `chore`, `refactor`, `test`
>
> A `feat:` triggers a minor release, `fix:` a patch, `feat!:` a major.
